name: alhazen-personal-assistant
description: Personal-assistant Alhazen skills sharing one TypeDB database (alh_personal): job-search pipeline management and personal health/fitness monitoring.

plugins.description: Track job applications, analyze positions, identify skill gaps, and plan your job search strategy

plugins.name: coach
plugins.description: Personal health and fitness monitoring -- ingest HealthKit metrics, track goals, surface regressions, manage appointments
